query:
SELECT id, firstName, lastName, email, pipelineStage, applicationSubmittedAt, createdAt
FROM recruitment_prospects
WHERE firstName LIKE '%Alastair%' OR lastName LIKE '%Naughton%' OR email LIKE '%naughton%'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
